title: Sunrun (RUN) Q2 2024 Earnings Report
text: Sunrun exceeded analyst expectations in Q2 2024 results, reporting earnings per share of $0.55, crushing the projected loss of $0.26—a 311.54% surprise. The company generated quarterly revenues of $523.87 million, marginally surpassing consensus estimates by 0.72%, though representing a decline from prior-year period's $590.19 million. Year-over-year, earnings improved significantly from $0.25 per share. Solar Energy Capacity Installed was 192 Megawatts in Q2, within guidance range, reaching 7.1 Gigawatts of Networked Solar Capacity. Storage Capacity Installed was 264.5 Megawatt hours in Q2 2024, representing 152% year-over-year increase from 104.8 Megawatt hours of Q2 2023. Cash Generation was $217 million in Q2, inclusive of ITC-related working capital investments recoupment from Q1. Net Subscriber Value was $12,394 in Q2 2024. Net Earning Assets were $5.7 billion, including $1,042 million in Total Cash, as of June 30, 2024. Sunrun has surpassed consensus EPS estimates three times over preceding four quarters, demonstrating consistent execution. Stock management assigned Zacks Rank #3 (Hold) suggesting near-term performance in line with broader market.
